reasoning: The visualization fails on two major fronts: chart type suitability and data completeness. First, a 'stacked bar' chart is inappropriate here because the x-axis represents a continuous time series (months), not categorical groups where stacking makes sense. Stacking monthly bars over years creates visual noise and makes it difficult to compare month-over-month trends or year-over-year patterns. A simple line chart or grouped bar chart would be far superior for time-series analysis. Second, the `x_lim` is set to `[0, 24]`, which cuts off the data for 2023 and 2024 entirely from the viewable area, despite the title claiming to show 2021-2024. The annotations mention 2023 and 2024 figures, but they cannot be seen in the plot itself due to the axis limits. This renders the chart misleading and incomplete.
suggested_improvement: Change the chart type to a Line Chart or Grouped Bar Chart to better represent time-series data. Expand the `x_lim` to include all months up to index 47 (Dec 2024) so that the full period requested (2021-2024) is visible.
